benchmark_freeze_status: Not automatically part of the frozen TEST benchmark. Validate this candidate and create a new freeze manifest before benchmark use.

execution.architecture: same-policy synchronous persistent CUDA/XPU/CPU actor lanes with cross-episode ORPD batching, measured-throughput allocation, and one centralized PPO learner update
execution.on_policy_synchronization: All actor lanes use one policy snapshot per epoch; PPO starts only after all matching trajectories arrive.
execution.hardware_scope_note: Auto-tuned shares are based on measured complete actor transitions per second, not Task Manager utilization percentages. Explicit ORPD development rollouts use the FP64 accelerator evaluator on the actor device; synthetic curriculum stages still contain host-side environment logic.

historical_data_policy: eligible TRAIN experiments only; validation/test experiments excluded; old trajectories used only for offline pretraining, never as PPO on-policy rollouts

warnings: Episode shares were auto-tuned from measured transitions per second rather than fixed percentages.
